title: anthyllis vulneraria var. pseudovulneraria
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria var. pseudovulneraria, also known as a variety of the kidney vetch or common kidney vetch, is a flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of Anthyllis vulneraria var. pseudovulneraria are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used externally to treat skin conditions and wounds.
